title: Generate a Service API for Data Processing
scenario: Create a Service API for data processing. The API should allow users to upload, process, and download data. The API should also handle errors and exceptions. The target output should be a Swagger API definition in YAML format. The output should be under 300 words and follow the standard Swagger v2.0 syntax.
constraints: Must include endpoints for data upload, processing, and download

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Swagger definition follows the standard v2.0 syntax
Verify if the API endpoint includes data upload, processing, and download endpoints, and handles errors and exceptions
Check if the Swagger definition is clear and easy to read
